properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v4 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: My weakness is hidden within Your glory Jesus, my strength is in You The odds are against me, but You are for me Jesus, my strength is in You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Power belongs to the One who was and is to come Power belongs to our God, alleluia

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: My steps have been ordered, You go before me God, I'm depending on You The hope of my future, found in You only God, I'm depending on You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Power belongs to the One who was and is to come Power belongs to our God, alleluia Power belongs to the One who was and is to come Power belongs to our God, alleluia

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Your presence cannot be outrun Your glory will not be outdone Your presence cannot be outrun Your glory will not be outdone
